seo.title: Investment Property Financing | Mortgage Programs | GSC
seo.description: Financing for investment and rental properties including DSCR and conventional investor loans. NMLS #2066586.

hero.heading: Investment Property Financing
hero.subheading: Loan strategies for real estate investors—cash-flow focused programs and conventional investor options.

intro.heading: Financing Rentals & Portfolio Growth
paragraphs: Searching for investment property financing near you in New York, New Jersey, Florida, or Pennsylvania? Green Street Capital is a licensed mortgage broker that compares multiple lenders for investment property financing and related programs — so you are not limited to one bank’s rules.

Investment properties are underwritten differently from primary homes. We help investors compare conventional investor loans, DSCR products, and other specialty options based on the asset and your experience.
Clear numbers on rents, reserves, and exit strategy make approvals smoother.
bullets: Cash-out refinance for renovations or acquisitions

sidebar.heading: Investor Toolkit
sidebar.body: From pre-approval letters to DSCR modeling, we keep the process practical and documentation-driven.

programs.title: DSCR Loans
programs.description: Qualify primarily on rental cash flow.

programs.title: Conventional Investment
programs.description: Traditional investor financing with personal income documentation.

programs.title: Bank Statement + Investment
programs.description: When personal income is complex but cash flow is strong.

programs.title: Refinance
programs.description: Improve rate/term or access equity on rentals.

faqs.question: Is this the same as a primary residence loan?
faqs.answer: No. Investment property loans usually require more down payment, different pricing, and property-level analysis.

faqs.question: Are investment property financing available in New York?
faqs.answer: Yes. Green Street Capital helps eligible borrowers explore investment property financing in New York (including NYC and surrounding areas) as a licensed mortgage broker. NMLS #2066586.

faqs.question: Can I get investment property financing in New Jersey or Florida?
faqs.answer: Often yes where licensed and program guidelines allow. We serve NY, NJ, FL, and PA — ask about investment property financing for your state.

faqs.question: How do I apply for investment property financing?
faqs.answer: Schedule a free consultation or choose a loan officer on our Team page. We will review income, credit, property, and program fit.

faqs.question: What credit score do I need for investment property financing?
faqs.answer: Requirements vary by lender and program. We review your full profile — credit is only one factor alongside income, reserves, and property type.

cta.heading: Grow your rental portfolio
cta.body: Apply with a loan officer experienced in investor financing.
